text: - F. Subcontractor shall cause his subcontractors to procure insurance covering the liabilities set out in Exhibit 'C' under policies which, in form, and amounts are acceptable to Contractor, and Subcontractor will obtain said policies or certificates therefore, and deliver  them  to  Contractor  if  requested  to  do  so  by  Contractor.  If  acceptable  insurance  is  not  acquired  by  Subcontractor,  the Contractor may acquire such insurance coverage and charge the expenses for such coverage to Subcontractor and deduct them from any sum due Subcontractor under this Agreement.
